title: Portfolio site template: audience-targeted and static-first
description: A free, forkable portfolio template for GitHub Pages. Each project is a JSON card, and an audience manifest with a ?audience= link curates the card set per viewer. Static-first, so it works with JavaScript off, and an AI coding agent can finish or restyle it. This site runs on it.
imageAlt: The template in wireframe mode, with dashed outlines and labels naming each region of the layout.
proves: Proves: information architecture, ABM thinking, AI-assisted build
